scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names api,portal,dashboard,map "conda run -n codex-agents uvicorn apps.api.src.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "pnpm --filter @sv/founder-portal dev" "pnpm --filter @sv/vc-dashboard dev" "pnpm --filter @sv/world-map dev"
scripts.test: pnpm test:web && pnpm test:contracts && conda run -n codex-agents pytest
scripts.test:web: pnpm --filter @sv/founder-portal test && pnpm --filter @sv/vc-dashboard test && pnpm --filter @sv/world-map test
